utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Plan provides physical_health €105/month, mental_health €60/month, subtotal €165/month. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Required 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Plan instead provides 'Photography Equipment & Liability Protection' with a cost €35/month. This is not home/contents insurance; scope mismatch, so not fully specified per required item.
- travel_coverage: Required 'travel insurance with costs'. Plan provides coverage description and cost €40/month. While generic, it fits travel insurance with costs. Considered fully specified.
- additional_services: Required 'any enhancement services with costs'. Plan lists services but no costs (only says available at extra cost). Not fully specified.
- total_budget: Required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Plan provides monthly_total €240/month and a comparison, but no annual breakdown. Not fully specified.
Thus, 2 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan lists: Health physical as InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical_health €105/month) and mental health as InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental_health €60/month). Property coverage is a photography equipment & liability protection; the closest matching rated item is InsurePlus Standard Coverage under home_content. Travel coverage is adventure activities coverage with cost €40/month; the closest matching rated item is InsurePlus Standard Plan under travel_insurance. Additional services mention optional legal support/claims advocacy but not purchased, so no mapping. Therefore, map: InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health) -> rating 10; InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health) -> rating 7; InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property) -> rating 10; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) -> rating 10.
